'''鈭歾-t-n-dh''' ('''kazatnedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beamwalk|beamwalk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-t-n-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beamwalk|beamwalk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-t-n-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kazatnedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizatnedhoko|thizatnedhoko]] || [[word:jizatnedhoko|jizatnedhoko]] || [[word:shizatnedhoko|shizatnedhoko]] || [[word:kizatnedhoko|kizatnedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzatnedhoko|thuthuzatnedhoko]] || [[word:jujuzatnedhoko|jujuzatnedhoko]] || [[word:shushuzatnedhoko|shushuzatnedhoko]] || [[word:kukuzatnedhoko|kukuzatnedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozatnedhoko|thozatnedhoko]] || [[word:jozatnedhoko|jozatnedhoko]] || [[word:shozatnedhoko|shozatnedhoko]] || [[word:kozatnedhoko|kozatnedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zatnedhoko|th忙zatnedhoko]] || [[word:j忙zatnedhoko|j忙zatnedhoko]] || [[word:sh忙zatnedhoko|sh忙zatnedhoko]] || [[word:k忙zatnedhoko|k忙zatnedhoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazatnedhoko|thazatnedhoko]] || [[word:jazatnedhoko|jazatnedhoko]] || [[word:shazatnedhoko|shazatnedhoko]] || [[word:kazatnedhoko|kazatnedhoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
